Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: WrathCombo job toggles + KBM press mirror, standalone build.
Description: Standalone fork of QoLTweaksKBM v26. Keeps WrathCombo's per-job combo presets (the rotation toggles) and the keyboard/mouse action-press mirror, with auto-rotation, multilingual resources, and IPC connections stripped out. Designed to load against a minimal/self-injected Dalamud.
Changelog: v1.0.5.0: initial MyTweak release. Forked from QoLTweaksKBM v26. Removed auto-rotation engine, multilingual resources, and Splatoon/IPC connections. Keeps combo preset toggles and KBM press mirror.
